title: Create service layer with CRUD and business logic
acceptance_criteria: StoDataService with pure functions for: addEntry, updateCredits, recordRecruitment, recordConvertion, recordEvent, deleteByName, getAllEntries, getMostRecentByName
All methods return Result<T> type for explicit error handling
Timestamps recorded when buttons pressed (not on page load)
Delete removes all entries with that name from DB
Service is dependency-injected, no static state
